notes: These selectors must be verified against the live Google Meet DOM. Update this file when Google ships UI changes.

fallback_strategies.participant_name_from_tooltip: Try aria-label or title attributes on the tile container
fallback_strategies.active_speaker_from_volume: Check for animated volume indicator SVGs if class-based detection fails
fallback_strategies.captions_from_aria_live: Look for aria-live='polite' regions as caption fallback
